headline: NRG Energy to Post Q1 Earnings: What to Expect From the Stock?
summary: NRG Energy heads into Q1 earnings with revenue growth expected from LS Power assets and rising data center demand.

headline: Duke Energy finalizes two initiatives to deliver more than $5 billion in cost-saving benefits to customers
summary: Duke Energy is committed to providing safe and reliable energy at the lowest possible cost and is delivering on that promise with more than $5 billion in cost-saving benefits to the customers and communities it serves.

headline: Exelon to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards for the Stock?
summary: EXC's first-quarter results may show support from earlier gas and electric rate changes and decoupled revenues, while storm repair and restoration costs may have weighed on performance.
